title: campylospermum elongatum
intro: Campylospermum elongatum, a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, is native to the tropical forests of West Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Campylospermum elongatum include the potential treatment of fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Campylospermum elongatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
